title: Corporate & Compliance Legal

Corporate & Compliance Legal

Please note that all links are GitLab-internal only.

Trading Window Status

GitLab Team Members can view the current trading window status via the Trading Window Status Issue .

Working with Corporate Legal

For questions related to corporate matters, please review the content and materials within AnswerBase . The team will continue to update the Corporate Library.

If the question a team member has is not answered within AnswerBase , please open an Issue pursuant to the RFP Process

Policies & Guidelines

Company Information - general information about each legal entity of the company

Corporate Governance Guidlines - guidelines to assist the Board of Directors in the exercise of its governance responsibilities and serve as framework within which the Board of Directors may conduct its business
